info_page_share_description: Share the link or QR code with guests. The page is public and does not require login.
info_page_not_published_hint: Publish the page to make the link and QR code available to guests.
info_page_not_found_description: This page may not be published yet or the link is incorrect.
info_page_load_error: Could not load the information page editor. Ensure the server is up to date and try again.
